conversation_history.user: I'd love to know more about the Deep Moisture Body Cream, can you tell me about its benefits?
conversation_history.assistant:
Hey! ✨ I think you'd really love this one:

**Deep Moisture Body Cream** by SilkBody
Rs.980

If you've been struggling with dry, tight skin, this is exactly what you need. This rich, buttery body cream will leave your limbs feeling soft and comfortably cushioned. Plus, it's perfect for targeting roughness and tightness, so you can say goodbye to those pesky dry patches.

🌟 **What makes it special for you:**
• Visibly softens and smooths dry skin
• Leaves skin feeling comfortably cushioned and hydrated
• Irritant-free formula, so you can trust it for sensitive skin
• Moisturizes deep into the skin, for long-lasting results

🧴 **Best match for:**
Normal skin ↔ Dry skin
Main concerns: Dryness, dehydration, premature aging

🌿 **The hero ingredients people talk about most:**
• Shea Butter → Nourishes and moisturizes dry skin
• Sweet Almond Oil → Hydrates and softens skin
• Vitamin E → Protects skin from environmental stressors

**How most people use it:**
→ Massage onto body after shower or whenever skin feels dry, focusing on elbows and knees
→ Use as needed, for an intense dose of moisture

💬 **Real customer love** (from 175 reviews averaging 4.5 ⭐)
Customers rave about how this cream leaves their skin feeling incredibly soft and hydrated, with noticeable results after just a few uses.
